'''Tarul wine''' was a prestige [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. It was a favorite of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Suudaa Nem'ro]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]. The [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] merchant, [[Lik Ankkit]] of [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]], owned a case of this vintage [[Wine/Legends|wine]], which was destroyed along with his villa during the raid by [[Omega Squad]], a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] squad of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
